description: Form I-94 Arrival and Departure Record issued to foreign travelers entering the United States.

i94_admission_number.instruction: The unique admission number assigned to the traveler on the I-94 record. It may be labeled as Admission Number or I-94 Number.

traveler_name.instruction: The full legal name of the traveler as shown on the I-94 record.

passport_number.instruction: The passport number associated with the traveler's entry to the United States.

country_of_citizenship.instruction: The country of citizenship listed for the traveler.

date_of_birth.instruction: The date of birth of the traveler.

date_of_entry.instruction: The date the traveler entered the United States, sometimes labeled as Date of Entry or Admit Date.

class_of_admission.instruction: The immigration class of admission granted to the traveler, such as F-1, H-1B, B-1, B-2, J-1, or other visa category.

admit_until_date.instruction: The date until which the traveler is authorized to remain in the United States.

port_of_entry.instruction: The U.S. port of entry where the traveler was admitted into the country.
